mapper.select:
SELECT MAX(DATE_FORMAT(Time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) as Time FROM `wavedata` where Channel in
#{item}

SELECT t1.`Index`, t1.Time, t1.DeviceId, t1.Channel, t1.Number, t1.Distance, t1.Wavelength FROM wavedata t1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT Channel, MAX(Time) as MaxTime FROM wavedata WHERE Time <= #{time} GROUP BY Channel ) t2 ON t1.Channel = t2.Channel AND t1.Time = t2.MaxTime ORDER BY t1.Channel
